principle: ARCHITECTURAL ISOLATION - Ecosystem Projects Stay Clean & Independent

tier_1_knowledge_foundation.name: GEOLOGOS-GALAXY GUIDE v1.0
tier_1_knowledge_foundation.stability: LOCKED - No changes, no additions from other projects

tier_2_publishing_engagement.name: GEOLOGOS Blog (Independent)
tier_2_publishing_engagement.data_flow: ONE-WAY READ ONLY (if integrated at all)

tier_3_tools_utilities.name: Ecosystem Tools (Master Toolkit, Creative Platform, etc)

principle_1_separate_databases.galaxy_guide_db: PostgreSQL: knowledge, tools registry, agents, mesh state
principle_1_separate_databases.rule: NO SHARED TABLES, NO CROSS-DATABASE JOINS

principle_2_separate_deployments.rule: EACH PROJECT CAN BE DEPLOYED INDEPENDENTLY

principle_3_separate_codebases.rule: NO CODE SHARING, NO CIRCULAR DEPENDENCIES

principle_4_optional_integration.blog_to_galaxy: Blog can READ Galaxy Guide API (but doesn't need to)
principle_4_optional_integration.toolkit_to_galaxy: Toolkit can LAUNCH Galaxy Guide (but doesn't need to)
principle_4_optional_integration.galaxy_to_blog: Galaxy Guide has NO knowledge of blog existence

architecture_diagram:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                   GEOLOGOS ECOSYSTEM - CLEAN ARCHITECTURE               │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

TIER 1: KNOWLEDGE FOUNDATION (LOCKED)
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              GEOLOGOS-GALAXY GUIDE v1.0 (STABLE)                    │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │ 26 Pillars • 730,000 words • Universal Knowledge              │ │
│  │ PostgreSQL | FastAPI | React | Mesh Network | Docker          │ │
│  │                                                                │ │
│  │ ISOLATION ENFORCED:                                           │ │
│  │  ✓ Separate database (geologos_kb)                           │ │
│  │  ✓ Separate codebase (/galaxy-guide/)                        │ │
│  │  ✓ Separate deployment (docker-compose)                      │ │
│  │  ✓ No imports from other projects                            │ │
│  │  ✓ Read-only exports (API endpoints only)                    │ │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                  ▲
                                  │
                    (Optional one-way read-only API calls)
                                  │
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  TIER 2: PUBLISHING & ENGAGEMENT (INDEPENDENT)                       │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                      │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │ GEOLOGOS Blog (Next.js)                                     │   │
│  │ 130+ posts • Newsletter • Analytics • SEO                   │   │
│  │ Markdown storage | Optional read from Galaxy API            │   │
│  │                                                             │   │
│  │ ISOLATION ENFORCED:                                         │   │
│  │  ✓ Separate database (geologos_blog)                       │   │
│  │  ✓ Separate codebase (/blog/)                              │   │
│  │  ✓ Separate deployment (Vercel/VPS)                        │   │
│  │  ✓ NO data export to Galaxy                                │   │
│  │  ✓ OPTIONAL API reads (not required)                       │   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                      │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  TIER 3: TOOLS & UTILITIES (INDEPENDENT)                             │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                      │
│  ┌──────────────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────┐                │
│  │  Master Toolkit      │  │ Creative Platform    │                │
│  │  (Electron launcher) │  │ (React/Music/Games)  │                │
│  └──────────────────────┘  └──────────────────────┘                │
│                                                                      │
│  ISOLATION ENFORCED:                                                │
│  ✓ Each tool: separate codebase                                   │
│  ✓ Each tool: separate database                                   │
│  ✓ Each tool: separate deployment                                 │
│  ✓ NO direct data exchange with Galaxy                            │
│  ✓ Can optionally CALL Galaxy API (not required)                 │
│                                                                      │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

KEY PRINCIPLE: ALL ARROWS POINT INWARD (Blog/Tools can READ Galaxy)
                NEVER OUTWARD (Galaxy writes back to Blog/Tools)

galaxy_guide_outbound: NOTHING ELSE - NO MUTATIONS, NO UPDATES
data_flow_rules.blog_to_galaxy_data: ZERO - Blog has its own content
toolkit_to_galaxy: OPTIONAL: Call API to display knowledge
data_flow_rules.galaxy_to_blog: NOTHING - Galaxy doesn't know blog exists

option_2_shared_infrastructure.database_isolation: Each service has separate DB user/schema
option_2_shared_infrastructure.network_isolation: Each service on separate Docker network

1_geologos-galaxy-guide.status: STABLE - NO CHANGES FROM OTHER PROJECTS
